title: Day 6: Bootstrap Prompts x6 Clients + werewolf-minigame-stub + Dev Mode + .meta Ignores
description: Create the 6 client bootstrap prompt templates (each containing the exact 5-line breathing guidance from mcp-first-fabric.md §4.2, adapted per client), the werewolf-minigame-stub inner fixture (minimal Cocos Creator skeleton for E2E testing), and Dev Mode (EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH env var + fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath + fab scan --target --debug). Also update fab scan DEFAULT_IGNORES to include Cocos-specific paths (**/*.meta, library/, temp/, build/) and make them configurable. The stub fixture exists so E2E tests do not require the read-only real werewolf-minigame project.

files.change: 5-line Fabric Bootstrap section + @AGENTS.md import directive; Claude Code specific: uses @AGENTS.md import syntax for full spec
5-line Fabric Bootstrap adapted for Cursor .mdc rule format; includes alwaysApply: true frontmatter
5-line Fabric Bootstrap adapted for Windsurf .windsurf/rules/ markdown format
5-line Fabric Bootstrap adapted for Roo Code .roo/rules/ markdown format
5-line Fabric Bootstrap adapted for Gemini CLI GEMINI.md format
5-line Fabric Bootstrap adapted for Codex CLI; placed at top of AGENTS.md since Codex reads AGENTS.md natively
Minimal Cocos Creator-like package.json with cocos/creator-related keywords to trigger fab scan framework detection
Minimal project.config.json that triggers Cocos framework detection in fab scan
Minimal Cocos Creator component skeleton (class extending Component)
Cocos Creator .meta file stub; must be excluded by fab scan DEFAULT_IGNORES
Minimal Cocos Creator component skeleton (PlayerController class)

files.target: Stub README (stub quality for scan test)
files.change: < 200 words README to trigger 'stub' README quality detection in fab scan
Read EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH env var or fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath; return resolved external project root; used by fab scan --target to point at real werewolf-minigame READ-ONLY

files.target: Update scan with configurable DEFAULT_IGNORES + Dev Mode
files.change: Support --target <path> flag (with Dev Mode resolution); --debug flag for verbose output; merge DEFAULT_IGNORES with fabric.config.json.ignores override

implementation: Create 6 bootstrap templates in templates/bootstrap/ — each must contain the EXACT 5-line content from mcp-first-fabric.md §4.2 (translate Chinese to English if needed for international use; keep as bilingual or English per team preference); adapt format per client: CLAUDE.md adds @AGENTS.md import, cursor uses .mdc frontmatter, Codex uses AGENTS.md header prepend

Create examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/ with: package.json (Cocos-flavored), project.config.json (Cocos detection marker), assets/scripts/GameManager.ts (minimal Component subclass), assets/scripts/GameManager.ts.meta (stub meta file), assets/scripts/PlayerController.ts, README.md (< 200 words stub)

Create packages/cli/src/dev-mode.ts: export getExternalFixturePath() that reads EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH env var first; then fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath; returns string or null; document: external fixture is READ-ONLY — fab init must not run on it without explicit --force flag

Update packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts: add --target <path> option (default: cwd; overridable with Dev Mode); add --debug flag for verbose console.error output during scan; merge fabric.config.json.ignores with DEFAULT_IGNORES
Run fab scan on examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/ and verify: framework detected as 'cocos'; *.meta files excluded from file count; README quality reported as 'stub'; diagnostic JSON valid

Verify 6 bootstrap templates each contain all 5 required lines from §4.2; spot-check that CLAUDE.md template includes @AGENTS.md import directive; verify cursor template has alwaysApply: true frontmatter

reference.pattern: 5-line breathing guidance verbatim from mcp-first-fabric.md §4.2; Cocos Creator project structure
reference.examples: mcp-first-fabric.md §4.2 for exact 5-line bootstrap content; §2 for client format notes per client type; real werewolf-minigame at /Users/wepie/Desktop/projects/werewolf-minigame (READ-ONLY reference only)

criteria: 6 bootstrap templates exist in templates/bootstrap/; each contains the 5-line Fabric Bootstrap content from §4.2 adapted to its client's format; CLAUDE.md includes @AGENTS.md import line
examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/ contains: package.json, project.config.json, assets/scripts/*.ts (2-3 files), at least 1 *.ts.meta file, README.md < 200 words
fab scan on examples/werewolf-minigame-stub produces valid JSON diagnostic with framework:'cocos', readme_quality:'stub', and *.meta files excluded from scan results

Dev Mode: EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH=<path> makes fab scan --target resolve to that path; fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath also supported; fab scan --target <path> --debug outputs verbose scan progress to stderr
DEFAULT_IGNORES includes **/*.meta, library/, temp/, build/; merges with fabric.config.json.ignores when present

rationale.chosen_approach: Minimal stub fixture for inner-track E2E (avoids dependency on read-only real project for daily dev); Dev Mode env var + config file for flexibility in pointing at real project when needed
alternatives_considered: Symlink to real werewolf-minigame (brittle, breaks on other machines)
Mock filesystem in tests (over-engineered for integration testing)
decision_factors: Real werewolf-minigame is READ-ONLY external fixture — cannot be modified or depended on for reproducible tests
Stub needs to trigger all fab scan heuristics (Cocos detection, .meta ignore, stub README)
Dev Mode needed to test outer-track E2E against real project without hardcoding path
rationale.tradeoffs: Maintaining stub fixture adds files but enables reproducible CI E2E without requiring the external real project

manual_checks: Run fab scan examples/werewolf-minigame-stub — check JSON output for framework:cocos, readme_quality:stub
Verify examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/assets/scripts/GameManager.ts.meta does NOT appear in scan file count
Set EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH=/Users/wepie/Desktop/projects/werewolf-minigame; run fab scan --target -- verify it resolves to external path
Open each bootstrap template and verify all 5 lines from §4.2 are present
Verify CLAUDE.md template contains @AGENTS.md line; verify cursor template has alwaysApply frontmatter
success_metrics: fab scan on stub completes in < 2s
All 6 bootstrap templates verified to contain §4.2 content
0 *.meta files counted in fab scan output for stub fixture

risks.description: Bootstrap template content in §4.2 is in Chinese; may need English version for international users
risks.mitigation: Create bilingual templates (English primary, Chinese comment); or English-only with reference to original Chinese spec
risks.fallback: Keep Chinese as-is per original design (target user may be Chinese-speaking)

interfaces.name: DevModeConfig
interfaces.purpose: Subset of fabric.config.json relevant to Dev Mode and scan configuration

key_functions.purpose: Resolve external fixture path from env var EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH or fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath
